input.userPrompt: What does the `stale-while-revalidate` cache directive mean in one sentence?
Display the full accessibility audit as a detailed report with evidence and prioritized fixes.

content.text:
# Accessibility Audit

## Critical findings

1. The payment modal traps focus.
2. Error summaries lack anchors.

## Priorities

| Priority | Finding | Owner |
|---|---|---|
| P0 | Focus trap | Checkout |
| P1 | Error links | Forms |

## Recommended fixes

Restore focus on close and link every summary item to its field.

input.userPrompt: Visualize the commerce data model as an entity-relationship diagram connecting customers, orders, line items, products, and refunds.
Export the assembled turbine model as a GLB file.
Render the feature-flag controls as an interactive panel.
Create a full-screen guided onboarding tour in raw HTML with animated spotlight transitions, keyboard navigation, and progress indicators.
Open the existing production analytics app at https://analytics.orchid.example and let me explore it.
